name: MCP Checklists
what_it_does: MCP server for managing checklists and structured task lists. Enables AI agents to create, read, update, and manage checklists — tracking completion status, organizing items, and supporting workflow management through AI-assisted checklist operations.
use_cases: Creating and managing project checklists from productivity agents
Tracking task completion status from workflow automation agents
Building structured workflow checklists from process automation agents
Integrating checklist management into AI-driven project management workflows
not_for: Complex project management (use dedicated PM tools with MCPs)
Teams using established task systems (Todoist, Asana, Linear) — use those MCPs
best_when: A team or individual wants AI agents to manage lightweight checklists — tracking steps in processes, creating structured workflows, and monitoring completion without a full project management tool.
avoid_when: You have an existing task management system. Adding a separate checklist MCP creates duplication. Community tool — evaluate fit before adopting.

auth.notes: Local operation — no authentication required. Data stored locally.

pricing.notes: Free open source MCP checklist tool.

known_agent_gotchas: Local data storage — checklists won't sync across machines without additional setup
Simple checklist tool — not suitable for complex project management needs
MCP-Manager org — evaluate maintenance activity before depending on this tool
186 stars suggests community interest but verify active development
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local checklist storage. No credentials. Data stays local. Low security risk for checklist content.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local storage. No credentials. Low risk.
